TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Osay_Hongay, title = Osay_Hongay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Osay_Hongay} }

S.FORM: Osay Hongay , samafana'ay a romadiw no Taywan. Maherek to i nacilaay a sakaenem a romi'ad koya saka33 a rekad a pipakaolah to no Cin-ci-cyang , i anini a mapakaolahay tonini a Cin-ci-cyang, masalaloma' ko cecay a samato'asay no Tafalong a niyaro' ci Osay ina, mapakaolah ciira to samafana'ay a romadiw to no Yin-cu-min a sowal a kaolah. Mapaherek ko demak no pipakaolah, fa^cal ko rakat niira a minokas a taloma' i Tafalong, kahemekan no i niyaro'ay ciira. Tomireng i ka'ayaw no panganganan a mapolong a pasasing, i 12 a folad no roma a mihcaan, mapasadakay ko ni Osay Hongay o no Tafalong no Kwang-fu no Kalingko ko no tato'asan a radiw no Pangcah, awaayho ko tatinakoan to samato'asay ko pakaalaay tonini a Cin-ci-cyang, maala niira ko samafana'ay a romadiw to no Yin-cu-min a sowal a kaolah. Salipahak saan ci Osay Hongay a mahemek, maseneng ciira a tomireng i pipakaolahan to Cin-ci-cyang, mapa^edil ko niyaro' no Tafalong. Sowal saan ci Osay Hongay, mamaan pakayni to pisadak to no tato'asan a radiw, mapakafana' ko 'alomanay to kahemekan a tato'asan a radiw no Pangcah, pakayni tinian a ngiha' no fangcalay a serangawan, caay ka citolas a mapaselic i ka^mangay a haliradiw to no to'as a radiw. == Pasadakay tonini a news ==
S.PHON: o~usaj ħo~uŋaj , samafanaʡaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw no~u tajwan. maħərək to~u i naʦiɾaaj a sakaənəm a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~uja saka** a rəkaɬ~ɮ a pipakao~uɾaħ to~u no~u ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ , i anini a mapakao~uɾaħaj to~unini a ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ, masaɾaɾo~umaʡ ko~u ʦəʦaj a samato~uʡasaj no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ ʦi o~usaj ina, mapakao~uɾaħ ʦiira to~u samafanaʡaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u no~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min a so~uwaɾ a kao~uɾaħ. mapaħərək ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u pipakao~uɾaħ, faʔʦaɾ ko~u rakat niira a mino~ukas a taɾo~umaʡ i tafaɾo~uŋ, kaħəməkan no~u i nijaro~uʡaj ʦiira. to~umirəŋ i kaʡajaw no~u paŋaŋanan a mapo~uɾo~uŋ a pasasiŋ, i ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u ro~uma a miħʦaan, mapasaɬ~ɮakaj ko~u ni o~usaj ħo~uŋaj o~u no~u tafaɾo~uŋ no~u kwaŋ-fo~u~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u ko~u no~u tato~uʡasan a raɬ~ɮiw no~u paŋʦaħ, awaajħo~u ko~u tatinako~uan to~u samato~uʡasaj ko~u pakaaɾaaj to~unini a ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ, maaɾa niira ko~u samafanaʡaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u no~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min a so~uwaɾ a kao~uɾaħ. saɾipaħak saan ʦi o~usaj ħo~uŋaj a maħəmək, masənəŋ ʦiira a to~umirəŋ i pipakao~uɾaħan to~u ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ, mapaʔəɬ~ɮiɾ ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tafaɾo~uŋ. so~uwaɾ saan ʦi o~usaj ħo~uŋaj, mamaan pakajni to~u pisaɬ~ɮak to~u no~u tato~uʡasan a raɬ~ɮiw, mapakafanaʡ ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u kaħəməkan a tato~uʡasan a raɬ~ɮiw no~u paŋʦaħ, pakajni tinian a ŋiħaʡ no~u faŋʦaɾaj a səraŋawan, ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɾas a mapasəɾiʦ i kaʔmaŋaj a ħaɾiraɬ~ɮiw to~u no~u to~uʡas a raɬ~ɮiw. == pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~unini a nəws ==
S.FORM: Osay Hongay , samafana'ay a romadiw no Taywan. Maherek to i nacilaay a sakaenem a romi'ad koya saka33 a rekad a pipakaolah to no Cin-ci-cyang , i anini a mapakaolahay tonini a Cin-ci-cyang, masalaloma' ko cecay a samato'asay no Tafalong a niyaro' ci Osay ina, mapakaolah ciira to samafana'ay a romadiw to no Yin-cu-min a sowal a kaolah. Mapaherek ko demak no pipakaolah, fa^cal ko rakat niira a minokas a taloma' i Tafalong, kahemekan no i niyaro'ay ciira. Tomireng i ka'ayaw no panganganan a mapolong a pasasing, i 12 a folad no roma a mihcaan, mapasadakay ko ni Osay Hongay o no Tafalong no Kwang-fu no Kalingko ko no tato'asan a radiw no Pangcah, awaayho ko tatinakoan to samato'asay ko pakaalaay tonini a Cin-ci-cyang, maala niira ko samafana'ay a romadiw to no Yin-cu-min a sowal a kaolah. Salipahak saan ci Osay Hongay a mahemek, maseneng ciira a tomireng i pipakaolahan to Cin-ci-cyang, mapa^edil ko niyaro' no Tafalong. Sowal saan ci Osay Hongay, mamaan pakayni to pisadak to no tato'asan a radiw, mapakafana' ko 'alomanay to kahemekan a tato'asan a radiw no Pangcah, pakayni tinian a ngiha' no fangcalay a serangawan, caay ka citolas a mapaselic i ka^mangay a haliradiw to no to'as a radiw. == Pasadakay tonini a news ==
S.PHON: o~usaj ħo~uŋaj , samafanaʡaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw no~u tajwan. maħərək to~u i naʦiɾaaj a sakaənəm a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~uja saka** a rəkaɬ~ɮ a pipakao~uɾaħ to~u no~u ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ , i anini a mapakao~uɾaħaj to~unini a ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ, masaɾaɾo~umaʡ ko~u ʦəʦaj a samato~uʡasaj no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ ʦi o~usaj ina, mapakao~uɾaħ ʦiira to~u samafanaʡaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u no~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min a so~uwaɾ a kao~uɾaħ. mapaħərək ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u pipakao~uɾaħ, faʔʦaɾ ko~u rakat niira a mino~ukas a taɾo~umaʡ i tafaɾo~uŋ, kaħəməkan no~u i nijaro~uʡaj ʦiira. to~umirəŋ i kaʡajaw no~u paŋaŋanan a mapo~uɾo~uŋ a pasasiŋ, i ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u ro~uma a miħʦaan, mapasaɬ~ɮakaj ko~u ni o~usaj ħo~uŋaj o~u no~u tafaɾo~uŋ no~u kwaŋ-fo~u~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u ko~u no~u tato~uʡasan a raɬ~ɮiw no~u paŋʦaħ, awaajħo~u ko~u tatinako~uan to~u samato~uʡasaj ko~u pakaaɾaaj to~unini a ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ, maaɾa niira ko~u samafanaʡaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u no~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min a so~uwaɾ a kao~uɾaħ. saɾipaħak saan ʦi o~usaj ħo~uŋaj a maħəmək, masənəŋ ʦiira a to~umirəŋ i pipakao~uɾaħan to~u ʦin-ʦi-ʦjaŋ, mapaʔəɬ~ɮiɾ ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tafaɾo~uŋ. so~uwaɾ saan ʦi o~usaj ħo~uŋaj, mamaan pakajni to~u pisaɬ~ɮak to~u no~u tato~uʡasan a raɬ~ɮiw, mapakafanaʡ ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u kaħəməkan a tato~uʡasan a raɬ~ɮiw no~u paŋʦaħ, pakajni tinian a ŋiħaʡ no~u faŋʦaɾaj a səraŋawan, ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɾas a mapasəɾiʦ i kaʔmaŋaj a ħaɾiraɬ~ɮiw to~u no~u to~uʡas a raɬ~ɮiw. == pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~unini a nəws ==
